### Problem / Use Case

In the team mode scenario, add key grouping and set the available grouping model.

### Proposed Solution

In the team mode scenario, add key grouping and set the available grouping model.

In the team mode scenario, add key grouping and set the available grouping model.

### Area

### Additional Context

I deployed it for use in an enterprise. The enterprise has its own token pool. I want to support grouping and select which model

### Expected Test Plan

comments.body:
Internally, we use Omniroute as an AI gateway. When there are dozens of keys to manage, we really need the ability to group keys and configure which models each group can access.

If this feature were available, it would greatly reduce configuration time.

title: [Feature] In the team mode scenario, add key grouping and set the available grouping model.
